rule: Use only these shells. Never invent new layouts.

shells.name: standard-app-shell
shells.description: Primary shell for all authenticated PAI product pages. Topbar + collapsible left nav + sticky sub-header + scrollable content body.

topbar.role: Global chrome — logo, user, nav actions

sub-header.right_actions: Explore In → spacer → Add(+) → Active Filters pill → divider → Filter button

use_for: Dashboards, list views, detail views, settings pages
Any page that needs left nav section switching
dont_use_for: Full-screen error pages (keep topbar+nav, drop sub-header)
shells.mobile_behaviour: Left nav collapses to 52px (icon-only) by default on narrow viewports. Sub-header right actions stack vertically below 640px. Content body padding reduces to 16px.

shells.name: three-panel-shell
shells.description: Standard shell extended with a filter/context sidebar between left-nav and content. Used for list-heavy pages with faceted filtering.
use_for: Any list page with 3+ filter dimensions
dont_use_for: Simple list pages with ≤2 filters — use standard-app-shell with a filter bar instead
shells.mobile_behaviour: Filter sidebar collapses to a drawer triggered by a Filter button in the sub-header. Left nav collapses to icon-only.

shells.name: auth-shell
shells.description: Full-screen standalone layout for login and authentication flows. No topbar, no nav.
dont_use_for: Error pages accessible to logged-in users
shells.mobile_behaviour: Auth card fills full width with 16px side padding on viewports < 420px.
